controls.title: FHIR Communications Security
controls.description: All FHIR communications should be encrypted using TLS/SSL.

controls.title: FHIR Patient Consent
controls.description: Ensure patient consent is recorded and respected before sharing FHIR resources.

controls.title: SMART App Launch Support
controls.description: Support SMART App Launch 2.2.0 for standardized app-to-server authorization.

controls.title: OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect
controls.description: Implement OAuth 2.0 with PKCE and OIDC for secure identity management.

controls.title: FHIR Type Safety & Validation
controls.description: Enforce strict type safety and profile-aware validation for all FHIR resources (BabelFHIR-TS approach).
